---
title: "Formation"
---


### EuroPharmat {#EuroPharmat-splf .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.euro-pharmat.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/europharmat.png" alt="EuroPharmat">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.euro-pharmat.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">EuroPharmat</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Association EuroPharmat
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
